_readme: USD per 1,000,000 tokens, keyed by model-id PREFIX (longest-prefix match wins; exact id is the longest prefix). Consumed by lib/usage-meter.cjs loadPricing(). Override without editing this file: set FORGE_USAGE_PRICING to an alternate JSON path (same shape), or pass loadPricing({ path }). Every cost computed from this table is an ESTIMATE — none of these rates was verified against a vendor pricing page from inside this build; the operator can verify/correct any row (this file is config, not doctrine).
source: Operator-recorded anchors in workspace doctrine (global CLAUDE.md model hierarchy): Fable 5 = $10 in / $50 out per Mtoken, documented as 2x Opus 4.x (implying Opus 4.x $5/$25). Cache multipliers per Anthropic's long-standing convention: creation 1.25x input (5-minute TTL) or 2x input (1-hour TTL); reads 0.1x input.
cache_note: cache_write_5m = 1.25x input; cache_write_1h = 2x input; cache_read = 0.1x input. Entries lacking the ephemeral_5m/1h split are priced at the 5m rate (may underestimate 1h-heavy sessions).

claude-fable-5.basis: operator-recorded anchor: $10/$50 per M, '2x Opus' (workspace model-routing doctrine)

claude-mythos-5.basis: assumed = Fable 5 (same underlying model per Anthropic's Fable/Mythos note); no independent source

claude-opus-4.basis: implied by the recorded 'Fable = 2x Opus 4.x' anchor; matches opus-4-5 through opus-4-8 by prefix — early opus-4.x rates may have differed

claude-opus.basis: catch-all prefix for non-4.x opus ids; same anchor-derived rate, least confident row

claude-sonnet.basis: training-data recollection of Sonnet 4.x list price ($3/$15); UNVERIFIED — no in-repo anchor

claude-haiku.basis: training-data recollection (Haiku 4.5 ballpark); UNVERIFIED — this rig routes no Haiku (doctrine: no Haiku)
